psalm-80-1.prayer: Lord, Shepherd of Your people, hear my prayer. Lead me with Your wisdom, care, and faithful presence.

psalm-80-2.verse:
Before Ephraim and Benjamin and Manasseh, stir up Your power
  And come to save us!
psalm-80-2.prayer: Father, awaken Your strength and come to help me. Let Your power bring rescue, renewal, and hope.

psalm-80-3.verse:
O God, restore us
  And cause Your face to shine upon us, and we will be saved.
psalm-80-3.prayer: Lord, restore me and let Your face shine upon me. Bring salvation, peace, and spiritual renewal to my heart.

psalm-80-4.verse:
O Lord God of hosts,
  How long will You be angry with the prayer of Your people?
psalm-80-4.prayer: Father, when prayer feels heavy and answers feel delayed, help me keep seeking You with faith and patience.

psalm-80-5.verse:
You have fed them with the bread of tears,
  And You have made them to drink tears in large measure.
psalm-80-5.prayer: Lord, when sorrow feels like daily bread, comfort me with Your mercy and remind me that You are near.

psalm-80-6.verse:
You make us an object of contention to our neighbors,
  And our enemies laugh among themselves.
psalm-80-6.prayer: Father, when conflict or opposition surrounds me, protect my heart from discouragement and keep me anchored in You.

psalm-80-7.verse:
O God of hosts, restore us
  And cause Your face to shine upon us, and we will be saved.
psalm-80-7.prayer: Lord, restore me again and let Your face shine upon me. Let Your presence bring healing, strength, and salvation.

psalm-80-8.verse:
You removed a vine from Egypt;
  You drove out the nations and planted it.
psalm-80-8.prayer: Father, thank You for planting and establishing Your people. Help me remain rooted in Your purpose and care.

psalm-80-9.verse:
You cleared the ground before it,
  And it took deep root and filled the land.
psalm-80-9.prayer: Lord, prepare the ground of my heart so that faith, obedience, and love may grow deeply within me.

psalm-80-10.verse:
The mountains were covered with its shadow,
  And the cedars of God with its boughs.
psalm-80-10.prayer: Father, let the life You plant in me grow strong and become a testimony of Your goodness.

psalm-80-11.verse:
It was sending out its branches to the sea
  And its shoots to the River.
psalm-80-11.prayer: Lord, expand the fruitfulness of my life according to Your will, and let my influence honor You.

psalm-80-12.verse:
Why have You broken down its hedges,
  So that all who pass that way pick its fruit?
psalm-80-12.prayer: Father, when protection feels removed or life feels exposed, help me return to You and trust Your covering.

psalm-80-13.verse:
A boar from the forest eats it away
  And whatever moves in the field feeds on it.
psalm-80-13.prayer: Lord, guard what You have planted in me from anything that would damage, weaken, or destroy it.

psalm-80-14.verse:
O God of hosts, turn again now, we beseech You;
  Look down from heaven and see, and take care of this vine,
psalm-80-14.prayer: Father, turn again toward me with mercy. Look upon what You have planted and restore it by Your grace.

psalm-80-15.verse:
Even the shoot which Your right hand has planted,
  And on the son whom You have strengthened for Yourself.
psalm-80-15.prayer: Lord, strengthen the work of Your hand. Establish what You have chosen and nurture what belongs to You.

psalm-80-16.verse:
It is burned with fire, it is cut down;
  They perish at the rebuke of Your countenance.
psalm-80-16.prayer: Father, when things feel burned, broken, or cut down, bring renewal through Your presence and power.

psalm-80-17.verse:
Let Your hand be upon the man of Your right hand,
  Upon the son of man whom You made strong for Yourself.
psalm-80-17.prayer: Lord, let Your hand be upon the one You strengthen. Uphold me by Your grace and help me remain faithful.

psalm-80-18.verse:
Then we shall not turn back from You;
  Revive us, and we will call upon Your name.
psalm-80-18.prayer: Father, keep me from turning back from You. Revive me, and I will call upon Your name.

psalm-80-19.verse:
O Lord God of hosts, restore us;
  Cause Your face to shine upon us, and we will be saved.
psalm-80-19.prayer: Lord, restore me, let Your face shine upon me, and bring salvation, hope, and peace to my life.

psalm-80-closing.verse:
Lord, thank You for being my Shepherd, Restorer, and faithful Keeper. Restore what is weak, revive what has grown weary, and protect what You have planted in my life. Let Your face shine upon me, and lead me back into deeper trust, obedience, and hope. May my life remain rooted in Your presence and strengthened by Your grace.

In Jesus’ name, Amen.
psalm-80-closing.prayer:
Lord, thank You for being my Shepherd, Restorer, and faithful Keeper. Restore what is weak, revive what has grown weary, and protect what You have planted in my life. Let Your face shine upon me, and lead me back into deeper trust, obedience, and hope. May my life remain rooted in Your presence and strengthened by Your grace.

In Jesus’ name, Amen.
